content: Phase 1: Ask user for Razorpay test API keys
Phase 1: Create POC test script (Razorpay order + signature verify + PDF receipt)
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until it passes
Phase 2: Call design_agent for enterprise UI guidelines
Phase 2: Build multi-tenant backend (auth, schools, students, fees, payments, attendance, etc.)
Phase 2: Build frontend (login, dashboard, school switcher, all role portals)
Phase 2: Seed 3 schools + demo users + sample students/classes/fees/attendance
Phase 2: Fix all issues found in testing
